mapper.insert:
select lpad((coalesce(max(substring(doc_no, 1, 5)::integer), 0) + 1)::text, 5, '0') as docNo from esg.tb_mgmt_of_change WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType}
insert into esg.tb_mgmt_of_change( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, comp_id, div_etc, content, req_orgn_id, req_dt, change_overview, change_dt, change_orgn_id, review_content, review_dt, result, result_content, div, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) values( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{compId}, #{divEtc}, #{content}, #{reqOrgnId}, #{reqDt}, #{changeOverview}, #{changeDt}, #{changeOrgnId}, #{reviewContent}, #{reviewDt}, #{result}, #{resultContent}, #{div}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )

UPDATE esg.tb_mgmt_of_change SET div_etc= #{divEtc}, content= #{content}, req_orgn_id= #{reqOrgnId}, req_dt= #{reqDt}, change_overview=#{changeOverview}, change_dt= #{changeDt}, change_orgn_id= #{changeOrgnId}, review_content= #{reviewContent}, review_dt= #{reviewDt}, result= #{result}, result_content= #{resultContent}, div=#{div}, use_yn=#{useYn}, updated_at=now(), updated_by=#{updatedBy} where write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_no = #{docNo} AND doc_type= #{docType}
UPDATE esg.tb_mgmt_of_change SET use_yn='N' where write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_no = #{docNo} AND doc_type= #{docType}
mapper.select: SELECT moc.*, toi1.orgn_nm as req_orgn_nm, toi2.orgn_nm as change_orgn_nm, tai_review.hr_nm as review_hr_nm, tai_change.hr_nm as change_hr_nm, tcd.minor_nm AS result_nm FROM esg.tb_mgmt_of_change moc LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info tai_review ON tai_review.target_type = 'MOC' AND tai_review.target_id = moc.write_year || moc.doc_no AND tai_review.type = 'review' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info tai_change ON tai_change.target_type = 'MOC' AND tai_change.target_id = moc.write_year || moc.doc_no AND tai_change.type = 'change' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_common_d tcd ON tcd.major_cd = 'C0035' AND tcd.minor_cd = moc.result LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info toi1 ON moc.req_orgn_id = toi1.orgn_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info toi2 ON moc.change_orgn_id = toi2.orgn_id WHERE moc.comp_id = #{compId}

select moc.*, toi1.orgn_nm as req_orgn_nm, toi2.orgn_nm as change_orgn_nm, tai.hr_nm as change_hr_nm from esg.tb_mgmt_of_change moc LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info toi1 on moc.req_orgn_id = toi1.orgn_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info toi2 on moc.change_orgn_id = toi2.orgn_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info tai ON tai.target_type = 'MOC' AND tai.target_id = moc.write_year||moc.doc_no AND tai.type = 'change' WHERE moc.comp_id = #{compId} AND moc.write_year = #{writeYear} AND moc.doc_no = #{docNo} AND moc.doc_type= #{docType}
